requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for DEWA PV Inverter Eligibility
requirement_topic.zh: DEWA 光伏逆变器资格所需 IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据
requirement_topic.zht: DEWA 光伏逆變器資格所需 IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據

summary.en: DEWA states that PV inverter minimum eligibility depends on compliance to IEC 62109-1/2 or UL 1741, with mandatory compliance certificates issued by third-party ILAC-accredited laboratories according to ISO/IEC 17025. For Dubai Shams Dubai projects, this makes inverter safety type-test evidence a practical eligibility gate before the model can be added to the DEWA eligible equipment route.
summary.zh: DEWA 说明，光伏逆变器最低资格取决于符合 IEC 62109-1/2 或 UL 1741，且强制性合规证书应由符合 ISO/IEC 17025 的第三方 ILAC 认可实验室出具。对于迪拜 Shams Dubai 项目，这使逆变器安全型式试验证据成为型号进入 DEWA 合格设备路径前的实际资格门槛。
summary.zht: DEWA 說明，光伏逆變器最低資格取決於符合 IEC 62109-1/2 或 UL 1741，且強制性合規證書應由符合 ISO/IEC 17025 的第三方 ILAC 認可實驗室出具。對於杜拜 Shams Dubai 項目，這使逆變器安全型式試驗證據成為型號進入 DEWA 合格設備路徑前的實際資格門檻。

standards_or_laws: UL 1741 as an alternative listed by DEWA
ISO/IEC 17025 and ILAC-accredited laboratory certificate expectation

summary.en: China GB-standard safety files and voluntary CQC/CGC reports may support engineering review, but DEWA's listed route requires the submitted compliance certificate to match the relevant DEWA eligibility criteria. A China-only report should be mapped to IEC 62109-1/-2 or supplemented with an accepted IEC/UL report.
summary.zh: 中国 GB 标准安全文件和自愿性 CQC/CGC 报告可支持工程审查，但 DEWA 列明的路径要求提交的合规证书匹配相关 DEWA 资格标准。仅中国适用的报告应映射至 IEC 62109-1/-2，或补充可接受的 IEC/UL 报告。
summary.zht: 中國 GB 標準安全文件和自願性 CQC/CGC 報告可支持工程審查，但 DEWA 列明的路徑要求提交的合規證書匹配相關 DEWA 資格標準。僅中國適用的報告應映射至 IEC 62109-1/-2，或補充可接受的 IEC/UL 報告。

standards_or_laws: CQC or CGC voluntary PV inverter certification

gap.en: The gap is not just the standard number. DEWA expects certificate evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory, model coverage consistent with the application, and clear linkage to the inverter family being enrolled.
gap.zh: 差距不只是标准编号。DEWA 期望证书证据来自 ILAC 认可实验室，型号覆盖与申请一致，并能清楚关联到拟登记的逆变器系列。
gap.zht: 差距不只是標準編號。DEWA 期望證書證據來自 ILAC 認可實驗室，型號覆蓋與申請一致，並能清楚關聯到擬登記的逆變器系列。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for DEWA Shams Dubai equipment eligibility where the inverter is submitted for Dubai grid-connected PV use; federal ECAS/EQM mandatory status must be checked separately
mandatory_status.cn: China-only GB or voluntary reports are supporting evidence unless accepted by the UAE route or mapped to IEC/UL requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Dubai projects, prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 or UL 1741 evidence from an ILAC-accredited lab before DEWA equipment enrollment. Treat this as separate from any federal UAE conformity certificate.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对迪拜项目，应在 DEWA 设备登记前准备由 ILAC 认可实验室出具的 IEC 62109-1/-2 或 UL 1741 证据。该要求应与任何阿联酋联邦合格证书分开处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對杜拜項目，應在 DEWA 設備登記前準備由 ILAC 認可實驗室出具的 IEC 62109-1/-2 或 UL 1741 證據。該要求應與任何阿聯酋聯邦合格證書分開處理。
